creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Can you show us your kernel configuration file? 
If you are able to reinstall at some point (not yet) 
would that be a problem for you?  It might be that 
something might have been removed while that was not 
the case yet, or that your hardware itself is blowing 
up. 

Can you give us some specs about your setup ? possibly 
a copy of /var/run/dmesg.boot (or more even better the 
version that is on your screen during boot?) 

what you do see in the various logfiles in /var/log ? 

Just a couple of questions I would love to see answered 
so that we might have a better understanding of what 
is wrong.
